boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Batch release BATCH-FJO-086 alone is insufficient; deviation closure CLOSE-FJO-086 leaves assay acceptance unresolved, and STD-FJO-086-P requires assay-acceptance status before shipment.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-FJO-086: accepted retest result remains pending; STD-FJO-086-P: assay-acceptance status required before shipment.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Source records present a definitive blocker: CLOSE-FJO-086 documents 'accepted retest result remains pending' while DEV-FJO-086 warns assay acceptance must be verified. The action boundary cannot close until assay AX-41 acceptance status is confirmed.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: STD-FJO-086-P establishes assay-acceptance status as a mandatory pre-shipment dependency. CLOSE-FJO-086 shows this dependency is unresolved. BATCH-FJO-086 release timestamp (2026-06-28) cannot override the pending acceptance status in CLOSE-FJO-086.

final_answer: Source records confirm the action boundary remains open. Deviation closure CLOSE-FJO-086 documents that the accepted retest result for assay AX-41 remains pending, while policy STD-FJO-086-P requires verified assay-acceptance status before shipment. Deviation alert DEV-FJO-086 reinforces this requirement. Although BATCH-FJO-086 indicates a release date of 2026-06-28, it cannot override the open dependency on assay acceptance. The process must escalate to obtain definitive assay-acceptance status before clinical batch release may proceed.
open_blockers: assay acceptance pending for assay AX-41
